title: To A Young Girl
content:
My dear, my dear, I know
More than another
What makes your heart beat so;
Not even your own mother
Can know it as I know,
Who broke my heart for her
When the wild thought,
That she denies
And has forgot,
Set all her blood astir
And glittered in her eyes.
meaning:
William Butler Yeats's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To A Young Girl"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
